Class Shippable

java.lang.Object
org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin.service.AbstractServiceSetup
org.eluder.coveralls.maven.plugin.service.Shippable
All Implemented Interfaces:
ServiceSetup
public class Shippable extends AbstractServiceSetup
Service implementation for Shippable.

https://shippable.com/
